title: P'loh
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=P'loh |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |domain= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Whatever happened to P'loh?"
"She was assigned to Belkadan, and died there.|Tahiri Veila and Nen Yim discuss P'loh|}} '''P'loh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and one of future [[Shaper caste|shaper]] [[Nen Yim]]'s crèche-mates. At one point P'loh, Yim and another of her crèche-mates, [[Zhul]], stole a [[korsk]]. This [[Sentience/Legends|creature]], used by the Yuuzhan Vong for cleaning, was released by P'loh and Zhul into a communal [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] area whereupon it consumed all of the [[i'fii]] there. Later, during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], P'loh was assigned to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' of [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]], where she [[Death/Legends|died]]. Yim's memories of P'loh were transferred to captured [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tahiri Veila]] when she was experimented upon by the renegade shaper [[Mezhan Kwaad]] and implanted with a Yuuzhan Vong persona known as Riina.''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' Veila discussed her implanted memories with Yim, who divulged that the memories of P'loh were her own. ==Behind the scenes== P'loh was first mentioned in [[Greg Keyes]]' [[2003]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=P'loh Yim |es=P'loh Yim }} [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong]]
